meaning: n.[生]螺原体(一种致病的原核生物)
examples: The Spiroplasma could survive for 8-17 years in the rotation or dried soil.
Phytoplasma is similar to mycoplasma and spiroplasma in size, structure and genetic evolution.
Pure honeybee spiroplasma was obtained by isolation and purification form the honeybees in R-2 medium.
